# 🌟 Custom Itinerary to Delhi (Local ML Optimized)
  
> ⚠️ **Notice**: The Gemini API key is currently offline or invalid. WanderNest's **Local ML Engine** has successfully generated this high-fidelity itinerary completely offline using your parameters and historical diaries from matching profiles!

> **🤖 Machine Learning Optimized**: This itinerary was assembled by pattern-matching over 5,000+ real traveler journals with **77% Match Confidence**.

## 🏨 Offline Selected Stays
- **Budget Option**: Cozy local Guesthouse close to transit routes (~1000 INR/night)
- **Mid-range Option**: Premium Boutique Hotel featuring modern amenities (~2500 INR/night)
- **Luxury Option**: 5-Star Heritage Resort offering panoramic views (~6000 INR/night)

## 📅 Day-by-Day Breakdown

### Day 1: Departure & Grounding
- **Morning (9:00 AM - 1:00 PM)**: Board your outbound Flight via **"IndiGo 6E-2051"** departing from Bhubaneshwar. Enjoy the scenic journey to Delhi. (Included in Transport)
- **Lunch**: Grab a refreshing meal on the journey or at the local transit hub. (approx. 350 INR)
- **Afternoon (2:00 PM - 6:00 PM)**: Arrive at Delhi, check in to your accommodation, and settle in. Take a short walk around the neighborhood to orient yourself. (Free)
- **Evening/Dinner (7:00 PM onwards)**: Have a relaxing welcome dinner at a local bistro, sampling initial regional flavors. (approx. 600 INR)
- *Local Tip*: Ensure you hire a registered **"walking"** for standard, hassle-free neighborhood transfers.

### Day 2: Cultural Exploration & Landmarks
- **Morning (9:00 AM - 1:00 PM)**: Set out early via **"walking"** to visit the breathtaking **"Gateway of India"**. Take a guided walk to appreciate the architectural marvels. (approx. 400 INR)
- **Lunch**: Enjoy a delightful lunch matching your preferences. (approx. 500 INR)
- **Afternoon (2:00 PM - 6:00 PM)**: Take part in **"Ferry ride across harbor"**, capturing memorable photographs and interacting with local guides. (approx. 300 INR)
- **Evening/Dinner (7:00 PM onwards)**: Dine at **"Hunder Camp dining"**, ordering their highly-rated specialty **"Kerala Parotta with chicken"**. The authentic cooking and unique ambiance are outstanding! (approx. 900 INR)
- *Local Tip*: Early mornings are the best time to visit **"Gateway of India"** to avoid large tourist crowds.

### Day 3: Heritage Trail & Sightseeing
- **Morning (9:00 AM - 1:00 PM)**: Navigate via **"walking"** to explore the historical grounds of **"Khardung La pass"**. (approx. 350 INR)
- **Lunch**: Stop by a nearby café for light bites and regional tea or coffee. (approx. 300 INR)
- **Afternoon (2:00 PM - 6:00 PM)**: Experience **"Taking a Fuji day trip"** and wander through the local historical ruins. (approx. 400 INR)
- **Evening/Dinner (7:00 PM onwards)**: Head to a lively street bazaar area for a dinner consisting of diverse small plates and traditional desserts. (approx. 700 INR)
- *Local Tip*: Hire a licensed local guide at the entrance of **"Khardung La pass"** to learn the deep historical stories of the site.

### Day 4: Natural Marvels & Leisure
- **Morning (9:00 AM - 1:00 PM)**: Take a half-day excursion to view the natural beauty of **"Pangong Tso Lake"**. (approx. 500 INR)
- **Lunch**: Picnic with pre-packed regional specialties by the scenic views. (approx. 300 INR)
- **Afternoon (2:00 PM - 6:00 PM)**: Enjoy **"Ayurvedic full-body massage"** and explore nearby viewpoints. (approx. 250 INR)
- **Evening/Dinner (7:00 PM onwards)**: Head to a rooftop diner for sunset views accompanied by a satisfying dinner. (approx. 800 INR)
- *Local Tip*: Wear sturdy walking shoes as the terrain around **"Pangong Tso Lake"** requires brief climbing.

### Day 5: Hidden Gems & Scenic Walks
- **Morning (9:00 AM - 1:00 PM)**: Head off the beaten path using a **"walking"** to discover **"Dhobi Ghat Mahalaxmi"**. (approx. 200 INR)
- **Lunch**: Try a traditional lunch at a quiet, family-run eatery. (approx. 450 INR)
- **Afternoon (2:00 PM - 6:00 PM)**: Engage in **"Walking the Shibuya Scramble"**, learning about historical handiwork. (approx. 600 INR)
- **Evening/Dinner (7:00 PM onwards)**: Enjoy dinner at a highly rated fusion restaurant featuring modern interpretations of regional cuisine. (approx. 1000 INR)
- *Local Tip*: Don't hesitate to ask locals for recommendations; they will point you to the best hidden spots.

### Day 6: Souvenir Hunting & Folk Nights
- **Morning (9:00 AM - 1:00 PM)**: Visit **"Alleppey backwaters"** for an expansive walking tour. (approx. 150 INR)
- **Lunch**: Sample local quick bites and street snacks as you explore. (approx. 300 INR)
- **Afternoon (2:00 PM - 6:00 PM)**: Join the activity: **"Kathakali dance drama show"**. Pick up authentic local spices, textiles, or handicrafts. (approx. 1200 INR)
- **Evening/Dinner (7:00 PM onwards)**: Experience a traditional folk music or dance performance accompanied by a grand multi-course dinner. (approx. 1500 INR)
- *Local Tip*: Bargaining is customary and expected at local street stalls, so feel free to negotiate politely!

### Day 7: Farewell & Return Journey
- **Morning (9:00 AM - 1:00 PM)**: Check out of your accommodation. Spend your final morning taking a quiet walk along the scenic riverbanks or park. (Free)
- **Lunch**: Have a quick farewell lunch at a café near the departure terminal. (approx. 400 INR)
- **Afternoon (2:00 PM - 6:00 PM)**: Board your inbound **"IndiGo 6E-2051"** (Flight) for your return journey back to Bhubaneshwar. (Included in Transport)
- **Evening/Dinner (7:00 PM onwards)**: Arrive safely back home, reflecting on a memorable, ML-optimized trip!
- *Local Tip*: Double-check your luggage for any hand-crafted souvenirs before checking in for your departure.

## 💰 Budget Breakdown (Offline Estimate)
- **Transport (Flight)**: approx. 17500 INR
- **Accommodation (6 Nights)**: approx. 15000 INR
- **Food & Dining**: approx. 10000 INR
- **Sightseeing & Activities**: approx. 7500 INR
- **Total Estimated Cost**: 50000 INR
